location: Rare drop from sword-and-shield-wielding Man-Serpents in and around Volcano Manor, Mt. Gelmir. A commonly used farm spot is the single Man-Serpent patrolling just outside the Guest Hall Site of Grace; another is the Man-Serpent found west of Prison Town Church.
tactics: Drop rate is low (roughly 3–4%) — resting at Guest Hall and repeatedly killing the one nearby patrolling Man-Serpent is one of the faster resets.
Only the sword-and-shield Man-Serpents can drop this — the spear- and Magma Blade-wielding variants elsewhere in the dungeon cannot.
Don't confuse it with the visually similar Smoldering Shield, which is a static ground pickup on the same dungeon level rather than an enemy drop.
lore: A small domed copper shield carried by the man-serpents native to Mt. Gelmir. Said to have been tempered in lava, it grants strong resistance to fire.

builds.name: Fire-resistant Strength tank
builds.why: Second-highest fire negation of any small shield behind only the Smoldering Shield, making it a strong pick for surviving Volcano Manor and the Rykard fight.
